title: Spyglass Enhancer
description: ✘ Enhances spyglass functionality with GUI hiding and Jade compatibility.
body:
_The mod is made to order._ (Mod for Useful Spyglass and Jade)


**Now when using the spyglass, the entire interface is hidden.**

**If you have the Jade mod installed, then when using the spyglass, only its interface will be shown, if you crouch, jade will be hidden.**

**We can arrange to order a mod at Discord, my nickname is Gvoper**
